case_title: GINA A. ESTRADA VS. KRISTOPHER GALLIMORE

docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF ESTRADA, GINA A. AS TO DEFENDANT GALLIMORE, KRISTOPHER
ORDER TO DISMISS CASE WITH PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT.
ORDER OF CONTINUANCE FOR PROGRESS REPORT.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-20-2022 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO AUG-08-2022 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF GINA A. ESTRADA IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT KRISTOPHER GALLIMORE IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAIVES PROOF OF SERVICE. SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT IN THE AMOUNT OF $2,227.00, INCLUDING COSTS IS REACHED. NO APPEARANCE IS REQUIRED AT THE NEXT HEARING DATE IF PAYMENT IS MADE AS AGREED AND THE CASE WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS SETTLED. IF PAYMENT IS NOT MADE AS AGREED, APPEARANCES ARE REQUIRED, AND JUDGMENT WILL BE ISSUED. COURT DISCLOSURE REGARDING CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS IS MADE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. / D. AU. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,070.14 FILED BY ESTRADA, GINA A. AS TO DEFENDANT GALLIMORE, KRISTOPHER ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-20-2022 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
